split.description: 推荐方案：目标主集按时长/文本长度做均匀覆盖抽样，no_text_voice 8 条单独作为 challenge eval；源侧按时间轴做跨全局的 blocked holdout。

notes: Model-level special_eval is reported separately from regular validation.
Current target_special_eval remains a punctuation-only challenge slice from no_text_voice.
Loss comparisons here indicate relative stress behavior on the current checkpoint, not final model quality.
Checkpoint-series evaluation summarizes z_art / e_evt ablation deltas across saved checkpoints.
Only checkpoints referenced by experiment metrics.training_run.artifacts.checkpoint_paths are included.
Special-eval series summarizes challenge-slice behavior across selected checkpoints.
Each checkpoint also has its own detailed special_eval_model.json and .md under reports/eval.
